allow: PowerShell(foreach \($o in 600,1020,1440\) { Write-Output "==================== offset=$o ===================="; npx tsx scripts/verify-precise-timing.mts $o 240 2>&1 | Out-String })
PowerShell(foreach \($o in 180,600,1020\) { Write-Output "==================== offset=$o ===================="; npx tsx scripts/verify-precise-timing.mts $o 240 2>&1 | Out-String })
